items.caption: The search for a new mother

My name is Brownie, these are my brothers, the chicks,
 and my mother is the chicken.

Mother feeds us worms and seeds, 
which she pecks from the ground with her long beak.

One morning, a young calf broke out from the barn,
 jumped all over and scared us.

Mother called us to hide under her wings, so that the calf would 
not trample us. But I didn't pay attention.
Mother was angry with me and pecked my head: "Very Dangerous!" - she said. Mother doesn't love me! I will have to find a new mother.
I was insulted, and ran away.

Hello White Goose, will you be my mother? "Of course I will",
 said the goose, "Come join my five ducklings for a stroll."
Mother Goose led us to the lake.
The ducklings all jumped happily into the water. Only I remained on the shore, trembling with fear.
"Silly you, don't be scared, the water is refreshing, just spread your feet out and swim" - said mother goose, and pushed me straight into the water.

I was startled. My feathers were soaked wet. 
If I hadn't jumped to the shore I would surely have drowned!
I ran from the lake as fast as I could.

How nice is that family of swallows, 
sitting in the nest on the windowsill.
Mother swallow, will you be my mother?

"Yes, gladly", said mother swallow, 
"Come join my nest and eat with my babies."

"It's time my young chicks, to learn to fly."
 Said Mother swallow.

"You coward, spread your wings out and fly!", said Mother swallow.
 "But my wings are short, and I can't fly like you", I Begged.

I wanted to be like the other swallows, 
so i spread my wings.... and fell to the ground.
My whole body hurt! But then I saw a beautiful Cat!
"Will you be my mother?" "Yes, certainly.." - Said mother cat. "Let's hurry to the basement, my kittens are learning how to hunt mice."
"But i'm afraid of mice!"

"Then you'll never make it! you'll always remain hungry!"
 said mother Cat, and scratched me!

How lovely is Mother Dog playing with her puppies, 
I think i'll join them. "Mother Dog, will you be my mother?"

Mother Dog jumped out of her kennel and chased me away. 
"Woof Woof! No No! You are not one of us! Go back to Mother Chicken."

I ran to my mother, Mother Chicken, and cried: "You are the 
best mother in the world! Only you are my mother!"

We all crawled together under mothers wings.
 It was wonderful!
